title: UriGrantsManagerService.grantUriPermissionFromOwner sourceUserId 参数不受控
notes: grantUriPermissionFromOwner() validates targetUserId via handleIncomingUser but sourceUserId (i3) is taken directly from caller without any cross-user permission check. Caller can specify sourceUserId=10 (work profile) to construct GrantUri pointing to another user's ContentProvider. Exploitability depends on checkGrantUriPermissionUnlocked inner logic (decompile failed for this 559-instruction method). takePersistableUriPermission and releasePersistableUriPermission have same sourceUserId issue.
